name: Maurice Williams
title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend, Distributed Systems, Payments Infrastructure)
base_skills: Backend & Languages: Java (Spring Boot), Node.js, Python (Django), Object-Oriented Programming, Distributed Systems
Architecture & APIs: Microservices Architecture, RESTful API Design, API Development, API Security, Public API Platforms, System Design
Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (ECS, RDS, Lambda, S3), Cloud-Native Architecture, CI/CD Pipelines, Docker, Infrastructure Automation
Data & Messaging: SQL Databases (PostgreSQL), Schema Design, Query Optimization, Transaction Management, Event-Driven Architecture, Messaging Systems
Payments & Financial Systems: Payment Systems Integration, Banking APIs, Transaction Processing, Financial Data Systems, Secure Asset Transfer
Engineering Excellence: Testing Strategies, Code Quality Standards, Continuous Delivery, Production Debugging, Monitoring & Logging
Soft Skills: Adaptability, Problem Solving, Relationship-building, Resourcefulness, Curiosity, Persistence, Emotional Intelligence

experience.title: Senior Lead Software Engineer
base_bullets: Led architecture and delivery of end-to-end full-stack platforms using React, TypeScript, Node.js (NestJS), and PostgreSQL, powering advanced analytics dashboards and automation systems.
Directed frontend engineering by building high-performance React and TypeScript applications with reusable component systems and optimized rendering for data-intensive interfaces.
Orchestrated backend development of scalable microservices, defining modular system design and enforcing clean, maintainable API contracts.
Implemented dynamic UI solutions with Vue.js, enhancing real-time data visualization and interactive dashboard capabilities.
Designed and governed RESTful APIs and third-party integrations, ensuring reliability, scalability, and seamless data exchange across systems.
Integrated AI and LLM-driven features to enable intelligent automation, semantic search, and data classification workflows.
Optimized database performance through advanced PostgreSQL schema design and indexing strategies, boosting efficiency by 40% under high concurrency.
Engineered distributed systems using Redis caching and asynchronous background workers to support event-driven processing.
Drove cloud infrastructure strategy by containerizing services with Docker and deploying to AWS ECS with fully automated CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions.
Partnered cross-functionally with product and design teams to convert complex requirements into scalable, production-ready solutions.
Mentored engineers and enforced standards through code reviews, architectural guidance, and best practices, strengthening team productivity and code quality.
Enhanced system observability by implementing robust monitoring and logging frameworks, significantly improving reliability and incident response.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
base_bullets: Built full-stack platforms using React, TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL to support financial analytics and reporting systems.
Developed React-based dashboards and visualization interfaces enabling real-time financial data analysis.
Designed scalable Node.js backend services and REST APIs handling high-volume ingestion from external financial data providers.
Implemented backend services using Python (Django) for data processing pipelines and internal automation tools.
Designed relational data models supporting millions of records, implementing indexing and query optimization strategies.
Developed asynchronous data ingestion pipelines and background job processing systems.
Improved API response latency by 35% through database optimization, caching strategies, and query refactoring.
Containerized applications using Docker and deployed to AWS infrastructure with automated CI/CD pipelines.
Worked closely with product and data teams to deliver scalable analytics capabilities.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
base_bullets: Built responsive web applications using JavaScript, React, and modern frontend frameworks.
Implemented backend services using Java (Spring Boot) and RESTful APIs supporting enterprise applications and reporting systems.
Developed backend services using Node.js for lightweight API services and integrations.
Designed relational database schemas and optimized SQL queries for transactional and reporting workloads.
Built reusable UI components and responsive layouts improving application usability and maintainability.
Integrated internal platforms with external enterprise systems through API-based integrations.
Assisted in migrating legacy systems to cloud-based infrastructure environments.
Contributed to CI/CD automation and deployment pipelines, improving release reliability and development efficiency.
Supported debugging and performance optimization across distributed application environments.
